title: repo-tools (rt) CLI Roadmap
description: Multi-phase roadmap for rt CLI: command restructure + tree migration, worktree-context extension integration, and daemon-powered features (status dashboard, port discovery, notifications).

phases.name: Command Restructure
outputs: Cleaned cli.ts tree with settings and port branch nodes

context_snapshot.top_level_nodes: x, branch, build, hooks, port, doctor, open, cd, code, daemon, settings

phases.notes: All 5 steps completed with incremental commits. Also cleaned up type-check references in x.ts and setup-keys references in branch.ts. setupSecrets removed from lib/linear.ts.

phases.name: Leaf Command Migration
outputs: All command files export named handler functions
cli.ts tree is the sole source of truth for command structure

phases.name: Worktree Context Extension Integration
outputs: Extension uses daemon HTTP API instead of direct Linear/GitLab calls

phases.name: Daemon Port Discovery
outputs: Daemon cache includes port scan data refreshed every cycle
rt port command uses daemon data for instant, zero-config display

phases.name: Status Dashboard & Notifications
outputs: commands/status.ts with dashboard and watch mode
